stories.headline: The Seductive Technology: A Story of Failure and Four Myths That Made It Possible
stories.summary: This report delves into the challenges faced in investigating bus safety in California, highlighting the limitations and seductive allure of relying on technology for journalism. The story critiques journalistic myths that lead to a prolonged investigation ultimately revealing less substantial findings than anticipated.

stories.headline: Problem Solving at U.S. News and World Report
stories.author_title: Ph.D. candidate at the University of North Carolina-Chapel Hill
stories.summary: U.S. News and World Report used computer-assisted reporting to investigate medical devices through FDA data, discovering significant obstacles including duplicate records and unstructured text fields that prevented proper data analysis.
